title: bidens kilimandscharica
intro: Bidens kilimandscharica, also known as the East African beggar ticks, is a plant species in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimalarial properties. Bidens kilimandscharica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
